subject: Fix DCAE Redis cluster config
commit_message:
Fix DCAE Redis cluster config

Fixed line break issue in redis-cluster-config.sh

Now seeing successful redis cluster configuration:
 9:M 31 May 16:25:37.442 * Synchronization with slave 10.42.59.66:6379 succeeded

Change-Id: If8d338d38662295e55fdc3869d4a945a82d595dc
Issue-ID: OOM-1093
Signed-off-by: Mike Elliott <mike.elliott@amdocs.com>
